title: Add NebulaCraft to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [NebulaCraft](https://nebulacraft-1c723.web.app) to learn
- Generate amigurumi patterns with Pollinations AI in NebulaCraft. Includes a PWA experience, SEO optimization, and a variation selector for iterative design.

Fixes #10429

gist.headline: Crochet the cosmos
gist.blurb: NebulaCraft has sprouted in the greenhouse! This new community app uses Pollinations to generate adorable amigurumi crochet patterns, complete with a variation selector for iterative design.
gist.summary: Added NebulaCraft, a new community app that generates amigurumi crochet patterns using Pollinations AI, to the project showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use NebulaCraft to design and iterate on custom amigurumi patterns directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an app called NebulaCraft that generates amigurumi (crochet yarn toys) patterns. The visual should feature Polly the bee interacting with cute crochet/yarn toys in a cozy setting, perhaps wearing a tiny crocheted scarf.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny crocheted scarf, happily examining a cute little amigurumi yarn creature. Balls of colorful yarn and a retro computer monitor glowing lime green (#ecf874) sit on a wooden desk. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
